No Tax on Tips Calculator

Since July 2025, tip income is federally tax-exempt for workers earning under $160K/year. Calculate your tax savings →

About tipright.app

Tipping in the US is expected for most personal services, but knowing the right amount isn't always obvious. tipright.app gives you a specific number in seconds, no ranges, no "it depends," just the amount for your service.

Every calculator shows five tip levels at once, 10% through 25%, and highlights the standard for that specific service. You can split the tip with friends or just compare the options. Everything calculates as you type. No button, no reload.

The shareable URL feature means you can calculate your tip and send the link to whoever you're with. They'll see the same numbers with no setup required.

No calculators found for ""
